data.title: 国际服卡池「Springtime Picnic」补给
data.summary: [Springtime Picnic Supplies] What goes better with the warmth of spring than picnic parties and gift
data.body:
[Springtime Picnic Supplies]

What goes better with the warmth of spring than picnic parties and gifts?
Please check your in-game mailbox to receive the picnic supplies we have prepared for you Sensei!
